assessmentObjectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of computing concepts
Apply knowledge and understanding of computing concepts
Analyse, evaluate and make reasoned judgements about computing issues

topics.name: Trace Tables
topics.description: Using trace tables to determine algorithm purpose

topics.name: Data Types
topics.description: Integer, real, Boolean, character and string

topics.name: Arithmetic and Relational Operations
topics.description: Arithmetic operators, DIV, MOD, relational operators

topics.name: Binary Arithmetic
topics.description: Binary addition and logical binary shifts

topics.name: Representing Images
topics.description: Bitmap images, pixels, colour depth, file size

topics.name: Representing Sound
topics.description: Sampling rate, sample resolution, file size

topics.name: Data Compression
topics.description: Huffman coding and run length encoding

topics.name: Hardware and Software
topics.description: Definitions and relationship between hardware and software

topics.name: Boolean Logic
topics.description: Truth tables, logic gates and circuits

topics.name: Software Classification
topics.description: System vs application software, OS functions

topics.name: Programming Languages and Translators
topics.description: Low-level vs high-level, compiler, interpreter, assembler

topics.name: Systems Architecture
topics.description: CPU components, factors affecting performance, Fetch-Execute cycle

topics.name: Memory and Storage
topics.description: RAM, ROM, cache, secondary storage, cloud, embedded systems

topics.name: Network Types and Topologies
topics.description: PAN, LAN, WAN, wired vs wireless

topics.name: Network Protocols
topics.description: TCP, IP, HTTP, HTTPS, SMTP, IMAP

topics.name: Cyber Security Threats
topics.description: Social engineering, malware, phishing, weak passwords

strands.name: Databases and Impacts of Digital Technology

topics.name: Relational Databases
topics.description: Tables, records, fields, primary and foreign keys

topics.name: Ethical, Legal and Environmental Impacts
topics.description: Impacts of digital technology on society
